homepage.meta.description.message: The official documentation of DM Loremind, the self-hosted tabletop RPG assistant.

homepage.feature.selfhosted.description.message: Your campaigns, sheets and lore stay on your machine. No cloud, no telemetry, no account to create.

homepage.feature.ai.description.message: Run Ollama locally for total privacy, or plug in a remote AI (1min.ai, Mistral, Google AI Studio or OpenRouter).

homepage.feature.multisystem.description.message: Manage several campaigns each with their own rules, character sheets, lore and contextual AI memory.

home.hero.pitch.message: Campaigns, lore, character sheets and rules brought together in a single workshop running locally on your PC — with a local or cloud AI that knows your world.

home.cap.lore.d.message: Pages, folders and templates to build your world. All linked in a navigable graph.

home.cap.graph.d.message: Your characters and lore interconnect based on the pages you've linked together.

home.cap.rules.t.message: Import rules or a campaign from PDF

home.cap.rules.d.message: With AI, digest a rulebook in minutes to build your game system. You can also import a campaign to create it in a fraction of the time.

home.cap.chat.d.message: Ask your questions; answers cite your documents and take the context of your lore and campaign into account.

home.cap.npc.d.message: Characters, enemies, items, random tables — each system with its own rules.

home.cap.campaign.d.message: Arcs, chapters, scenes and tracked sessions, with an AI memory unique to each table.

home.grimoire.title.message: A complete workshop to run your games

home.shot.dash.d.message: A dashboard bringing together campaigns, lore and shortcuts — built to prep fast and improvise with confidence.

home.shot.lore.t.message: One space to rule them all, and in the darkness bind them

home.shot.lore.d.message: Starting from templates, organize your lore into interlinked pages. The AI draws on them to answer your questions within your world.

home.final.text.message: Installable in one double-click (desktop) or via Docker (homelab). Free and open source — support development on Patreon for betas and behind-the-scenes.

home.meta.description.message: DM Loremind: the self-hosted workshop for Game Masters — lore, campaigns, sheets and AI grounded in your own rules.

download.meta.desc.message: Download the latest version of DM Loremind for Windows and Linux.

download.subtitle.message: Free and open source. Pick your platform.

download.win.desc.message: .msi installer — double-click, nothing else to install.

download.linux.desc.message: Portable AppImage — any distro: chmod +x then double-click.

home.shot.npc.t.message: NPCs ready to take the stage

home.shot.npc.d.message: Characters, enemies and items structured by system — crafted entirely by you, always at hand mid-session.

home.shot.import.d.message: Import a rules or campaign PDF: the AI extracts its structure in minutes to build your game system.

home.shot.sessions.t.message: Run your games, keep the thread

home.shot.sessions.d.message: Arcs, chapters, scenes and tracked sessions: prep, play, and find every detail from one game to the next.

home.shot.chat.t.message: An AI that masters your world

home.shot.chat.d.message: Chat with an assistant grounded in YOUR sources — rules, lore, campaign. It draws on your documents and stays in your world's tone.
